markets.no_sub_title: Shintaro Mochizuki
markets.rules_primary: If Shintaro Mochizuki wins set 2 in the Benjamin Bonzi vs Shintaro Mochizuki professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Indian Wells Qualification Round 2, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Benjamin Bonzi vs Shintaro Mochizuki professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Indian Wells Qualification Round 2.
